milestones.title: Senior Full Stack Developer & Team Lead at TradeCafe
milestones.summary: Joined the engineering team behind a global protein commodity trading platform serving 2,000+ corporate buyers across 82 markets.
bullets: Own backend architecture for a multi-tenant trading platform handling real-time market data
Build and maintain RESTful and GraphQL APIs in Node.js and NestJS
Lead a team of engineers on technical direction and code review
Design database schemas across MongoDB and PostgreSQL for high-throughput operations

milestones.title: Tech Lead at Spikeet Inc
milestones.summary: Designed and built the customer-facing application from the ground up for a fintech SaaS delivering historical market data to traders and investors.
bullets: Architected the entire backend from scratch — service boundaries, data flow, and infrastructure
Implemented microservices with Express.js and Flask for scalable data querying
Managed full AWS infrastructure and automated CI/CD pipelines
Integrated Stripe for subscription billing and payment lifecycle management

milestones.title: Senior Software Engineer at Cekaso GmbH
milestones.summary: Senior backend engineer on a 3+ year engagement building enterprise ERP systems on Microsoft Azure for major European furniture companies.
bullets: Designed and developed a full-featured ERP system using Node.js and RESTful APIs
Architected cloud infrastructure on Azure — Functions, Cosmos DB, Cognitive Search, Blob Storage
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines in Bitbucket across staging and production
Maintained zero critical outages over 3+ years of production operation

milestones.title: Senior Back-End Developer at The Neuron
milestones.summary: Built the backend platform for a digital signage company managing ad scheduling and delivery across distributed screens.
bullets: Designed microservices for tracking and scheduling ads across distributed digital screens
Deployed and managed services on AWS (ElasticBeanstalk, RDS, CloudWatch, CloudFront)
Built an Angular admin dashboard for analytics and performance monitoring
Optimized API performance and database efficiency for growing traffic

milestones.title: Android & Backend Developer at Lersha App
milestones.summary: Built a mobile-first agricultural platform connecting Ethiopian farmers with verified suppliers, advisory services, and mechanization providers.
bullets: Designed the Android app with offline-first architecture for low-connectivity regions
Implemented geo-location matching for nearby service providers
Built the Node.js/Express backend powering the mobile API
Set up Jenkins CI/CD for automated testing and deployment

milestones.title: Back End Developer at Outlier.org
milestones.summary: Contributed to a US-based edtech platform offering accredited university-level courses, building backend services and integrating assessment tools.
bullets: Developed backend APIs and frontend modules for course management, progress tracking, and grading
Integrated Proctorio for secure online assessments and academic integrity
Worked on Airtable integration for managing student data and enrollment records
Collaborated with designers and engineers to improve platform performance and data synchronization

milestones.title: Full Stack Developer at iCog Labs
milestones.summary: First professional role — built a ride-hailing platform in collaboration with Honda at one of Ethiopia's leading AI research labs.
bullets: Developed the backend and management dashboard for a ride-hailing platform with Honda
Full-cycle development from requirement gathering to deployment
Implemented route optimization to improve trip efficiency
Designed RESTful APIs for mobile communication and trip management

milestones.title: Graduated from Addis Ababa University
milestones.summary: Completed Bachelor of Science in Computer Software Engineering from Addis Ababa Institute of Technology (AAiT) with a 3.89 CGPA.
bullets: B.Sc. in Computer Software Engineering
Addis Ababa Institute of Technology (AAiT)
CGPA: 3.89
Strong foundation in algorithms, data structures, and system design
